title: poll-report
description: Produces of a source-puller poll step (W4). complete:false must fail validation so a cursor: step does not advance the watermark.

complete.description: True only when the poll finished its window (no rate-limit/pagination shortfall). False → cursor must not advance.

updated_at.description: High-water updated_at of the poll window (ISO-8601).

id.description: Tiebreak id at that updated_at (provider object id).

emitted.description: Count of work-item files written this poll.

source.description: Source name matching the work-items emitted.
